title: He Mourns For The Change That Has Come Upon Him And His Beloved, And Longs For The End Of The World
meaning:
William Butler Yeats's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "He Mourns For The Change That Has Come Upon Him And His Beloved, And Longs For The End Of The World"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
